commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c13fc5ed73cd27ba9534e0103f050337f351fe81)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Browserbase browser profile driver with per-attach Sessions API connectUrl resolution, related browser profile types/capabilities/docs/tests, and higher remote-CDP timeout defaults.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: the PR head still rejects the documented profile in the runtime schema, and common Playwright route paths still receive profileCtx.profile.cdpUrl even though browserbase profiles resolve it to an empty string. I did not run code or Browserbase live because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor revisions and real Browserbase proof are required; ClawSweeper should not queue an autofix for an external PR whose real environment proof is still missing.
